headline: American Express Targets Travelers And Sports Fans While Shares Trade Below Estimates
summary: American Express (NYSE:AXP) introduced new travel benefits and refreshed card designs for Delta SkyMiles Card Members. The company launched rideshare credits and additional baggage allowance on certain Delta SkyMiles products with no fee increase. American Express also announced a global partnership with Fanatics focused on payments and sports related engagement. For American Express, travel and experiences remain central to the value proposition, particularly for premium card members who...

headline: Is American Express (AXP) One of the Best Value Dividend Stocks to Buy Now According to Warren Buffett?
summary: American Express Company (NYSE:AXP) is included among the 10 Best Value Dividend Stocks to Buy Now According to Warren Buffett. On June 9, BofA analyst Mihir Bhatia reiterated a Buy rating on American Express Company (NYSE:AXP). He also maintained a $387 price target on the stock. The analyst said management’s update at a recent investor […]
